example: They only show cartoons on television.
Animation is made with many pictures called frames.
ja: アニメーション、動画制作

example: Each frame is a little bit different from the one before it.
zh: 畫面幀，動畫中的單張圖片
ja: フレーム、アニメの一コマ

example: Stop motion is made by posing the model and taking pictures.
zh: 定格動畫，一種逐格拍攝的動畫技術
ja: ストップモーション、コマ撮りアニメーション

example: Clay animation uses models made of modeling clay.
zh: 黏土動畫，使用黏土製作的動畫
ja: クレイアニメーション、粘土を使ったアニメ

example: They make a computer model of a character, a digital puppet.
zh: 數位木偶，電腦製作的角色模型
ja: デジタルパペット、コンピュータで作られたキャラクターモデル

example: The simplest alarm is a siren or light bulb.
The alarm was invented to keep houses safe and secure.
zh: 安全警報器，保護財產的裝置
ja: セキュリティアラーム、防犯警報

example: Cats and dogs have a sixth sense that humans don't have.
We use a scale to measure the dog's weight.
Pets need a nutritious diet to stay healthy.
Humans can see their reflection in a mirror.
The mirror reflects light and shows our image.
The mirror is scratched on the back.
A shiny coating is sprayed on the glass to make a mirror.
Only vampires can't see their reflections.
He thought he became a ghost.
